channel.title: doyouknow.app - English
channel.description: Surprising facts about UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the world.

item.title: Best Brunches in Dubai
item.description: An evergreen guide to Dubai brunches by format, neighborhood, cuisine, atmosphere, family suitability, booking style, and how to choose without stale prices.

item.title: Dubai Art & Culture Scene
item.description: Explore Dubai art and culture through Alserkal Avenue, museums, heritage districts, galleries, design spaces, festivals, and practical planning tips.

item.title: How Much Does It Cost to Register a Company in Dubai?
item.description: An evergreen cost framework for Dubai company registration, covering license tiers, offices, visas, government fees, compliance, banking, and renewal planning.

item.title: Dubai Driving & Car Ownership Guide
item.description: A descriptive Dubai driving and car ownership guide covering resident licences, road habits, buying, renting, insurance, Salik, parking, and practical safety.

item.title: Dubai for Families
item.description: Plan Dubai with kids using this family guide to attractions, parks, beaches, malls, school context, transport, heat planning, and relaxed itineraries.

item.title: Dubai Fitness & Outdoor Activities
item.description: Discover Dubai fitness and outdoor activities, from gyms and cycling tracks to beaches, desert walks, Hatta, running routes, and seasonal planning.

item.title: Dubai Water Parks & Theme Parks
item.description: Compare Dubai water parks and theme parks by location, age group, ride style, weather, ticket format, transport, and family planning needs.

item.title: What Is the UAE Golden Visa Investor Track?
item.description: An evergreen explainer on the UAE Golden Visa investor routes, eligibility logic, documents, property and business investment considerations, and common mistakes.

item.title: Saudi Arabia's SME Support Programs Explained
item.description: A founder-friendly guide to Saudi SME support programs, including Monsha’at services, financing support, guarantees, training, procurement, and growth resources.

item.title: How Free Zones Work in the UAE: A Founder's Comparison
item.description: Compare UAE free zones through a founder lens: licensing, offices, visas, tax, banking, mainland access, and how to choose the right jurisdiction.

item.title: UAE vs Saudi Arabia: Where Should You Start a Business?
item.description: A founder-focused comparison of UAE and Saudi business setup, covering market size, speed, regulation, talent, costs, banking, and go-to-market strategy.

item.title: Why Is Dubai So Rich?
item.description: A practical business explainer on how Dubai built wealth through trade, aviation, real estate, tourism, services, free zones, and long-term diversification.

item.title: How to Use Absher: Complete Guide for Residents
item.description: A practical English guide to using Saudi Arabia's Absher platform: registration, login, residency renewal, traffic fines, visas, and common fixes.

item.title: Best Beach Clubs in Dubai: How to Choose the Right Day Pass
item.description: An evergreen Dubai beach club guide covering resort day passes, party pools, family-friendly venues, quiet luxury, booking tips, and seasonal planning.

item.title: 10 Best Places to Visit in Saudi Arabia
item.description: Discover the best places to visit in Saudi Arabia, from AlUla and Historic Jeddah to Asir, Riyadh, the Red Sea, and the Edge of the World.

item.title: Best Restaurants in Riyadh: A Food Lover's Guide
item.description: From Najdi classics to fine dining, discover the best restaurants in Riyadh. A practical guide for visitors, residents, and curious eaters.

item.title: Dubai Day Trips: Hatta, Al Ain & Fujairah
item.description: Plan the best day trips from Dubai with routes to Hatta, Al Ain, Fujairah, Khor Fakkan, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and Musandam.

item.title: Dubai Free Things To Do: 50+ Ideas That Cost Nothing
item.description: Discover 50+ free things to do in Dubai, from beaches and souks to fountains, heritage districts, public art, viewpoints, walks, and family ideas.

item.title: Dubai Nightlife Guide: Bars, Clubs, Live Music & Rules
item.description: Plan a smart night out in Dubai with this evergreen guide to bars, clubs, lounges, live music, dress codes, transport, and licensing basics.

item.title: Dubai Parking Guide: RTA Zones, Apps, Payments & Fines
item.description: A practical Dubai parking guide explaining RTA public parking zones, payment apps, SMS basics, mall parking, common fines, and visitor tips.
